title: Small college AI-policy adaptation debts
purpose: Prioritize stale assumptions created by fast AI, platform, and policy change without blaming individuals.

adaptation_debts.stale_assumption: AI use is rare enough to handle case by case
adaptation_debts.visible_symptom: Students and faculty ask the same boundary questions repeatedly
adaptation_debts.cheap_next_review: Create assignment-level AI-use clarity cards for top 3 courses

adaptation_debts.stale_assumption: Academic integrity is mainly detector enforcement
adaptation_debts.visible_symptom: False-positive fear and weak proof-of-learning records
adaptation_debts.cheap_next_review: Pilot visible-thinking repair tickets before detector escalation

adaptation_debts.stale_assumption: Policy pages only need annual review
adaptation_debts.visible_symptom: Guidance goes stale after major platform or regulator updates
adaptation_debts.cheap_next_review: Add signal-to-policy diff check after major AI education updates

top_repair_queue.action: Convert one high-friction assignment into an AI Use Clarity Micro-Policy Card
Pilot Visible Thinking Repair Ticket for weak-evidence submissions
Set a monthly owner-reviewed AI policy freshness check

items: Convert one high-friction assignment into an AI Use Clarity Micro-Policy Card

review_flags: Do not frame as compliance/risk score
Avoid blaming individuals for institutional lag
boundary_note: Review aid only. This ledger is not a formal risk assessment, legal review, compliance assurance, or accreditation document.
notes: Synthetic example for local practice and Hypernovelty article/product development.
